title: Incorrect URL in notifications when using queue mode
symptom: When using queue mode with workers, the URLs sent in notifications are incorrect, leading to 'Invalid url' errors when responding to Telegram messages.
applies_when: Using queue mode with multiple workers
Notifications sent via Telegram or error workflows
not_this_if: URLs are correct in non-queue mode
root_cause: In queue mode, the environment variables for webhook and host settings may not be correctly configured, causing n8n to generate URLs with the wrong protocol or port.
fix_steps: Set the environment variables on both the main and worker instances:
Restart both the main and worker instances to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Configure the environment variables for both main and worker instances as specified.
